case_title: IN RE: STANLEY DON PATTERSON SR. (Petition striken per 11/1/06 order)

docket_entries.description: PETITION FOR CHANGE OF NAME FILED BY PETITIONER PATTERSON SR., STANLEY DON JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PETITIONER PATTERSON SR., STANLEY DON HEARING SET FOR OCT-18-2006 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206

HEARING HELD. FEE WAIVER DENIED. STANLEY DON PATTERSON HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECCESARIES OF LIFE AND COURT FEES AND COSTS. ORDER SIGNED. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF FEE SENT TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE ELLEN CHAITIN; CLERK: R. GOULDING; REPORTER: BRENDA FIELDS, CSR # 7235 (206)

FEES NOT PAID. PETITION FILED ON 8/29/06 OF STANLEY DON PATTERSON SR. IS STRICKEN. NOTICE SENT TO PARTIES.
UNCONTESTED CALENDAR OF OCT-31-2006 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME OFF CALENDAR. NO APPEARANCE.
